---
title: "Education Methods"
subtitle: "Methods notes on credible impact evaluation & measurement in education."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
page-layout: full
---

Plain-spoken notes on running education evaluations you can actually trust — baseline equivalence, measurement, effect sizes, and the quiet mistakes that wreck a study. New posts every couple of weeks; get them by email:

```{=html}
<form action="https://buttondown.com/api/emails/embed-subscribe/esa" method="post" target="_blank" class="embeddable-buttondown-form" style="margin:0.6em 0 1.2em;">
  <input type="email" name="email" id="bd-email" placeholder="you@example.com" required aria-label="Email address" style="padding:0.45em; min-width:18em; margin-right:0.4em;" />
  <input type="submit" value="Subscribe" style="padding:0.45em 1em;" />
  <p style="font-size:0.8em; color:#666; margin-top:0.4em;"><a href="https://buttondown.com/refer/esa" target="_blank">Powered by Buttondown.</a></p>
</form>
```
